name: Roller Coaster Expanded
description: Once the Pacifica Gonks rebooted the Malls power for the Movie Theatre, it was only a matter of time until they discovered the Roller Coaster out back........This Expanded Roller Coaster is now a Front for Eddies, Packed with Npcs Standing In-Line and Sitting around the Pavilion. Courtesy the Gangs of Pacifica!
